en: In the days of Ahaz the son of Jotham, son of Uzziah, king of Judah, Rezin the king of Syria and Pekah the son of Remaliah the king of Israel came up to Jerusalem to wage war against it, but could not yet mount an attack against it.
zh: 烏西雅的孫子、約坦的兒子猶大王亞哈斯在位的日子，亞蘭王利汛和利瑪利的兒子以色列王比加，上來攻打耶路撒冷，卻不能把它攻陷。

en: When the house of David was told, "Syria is in league with Ephraim," the heart of Ahaz and the heart of his people shook as the trees of the forest shake before the wind.
zh: 有人告訴大衛家說：“亞蘭已經在以法蓮地安營。”王的心和人民的心就都震動，像林中的樹被風搖動一樣。

en: And the LORD said to Isaiah, "Go out to meet Ahaz, you and Shear-jashub your son, at the end of the conduit of the upper pool on the highway to the Washer's Field.
zh: 耶和華對以賽亞說：“你和你的兒子施亞雅述出去，在上池的水溝盡頭，就是在漂布者田間的大路上，去迎接亞哈斯，

en: And say to him, 'Be careful, be quiet, do not fear, and do not let your heart be faint because of these two smoldering stumps of firebrands, at the fierce anger of Rezin and Syria and the son of Remaliah.
zh: 對他說：‘你要謹慎，要鎮定，不要因亞蘭王利汛和利瑪利的兒子這兩個冒煙的火把頭所發的怒氣而害怕，也不要心裡膽怯。

en: Because Syria, with Ephraim and the son of Remaliah, has devised evil against you, saying,
zh: 因為亞蘭、以法蓮和利瑪利的兒子，設惡謀要害你，說：

en: "Let us go up against Judah and terrify it, and let us conquer it for ourselves, and set up the son of Tabeel as king in the midst of it,"
zh: “我們可以上去攻打猶大，擾亂她，把她攻佔過來，歸我們所有，又在其中立他比勒的兒子作王。”

en: thus says the Lord GOD: "' It shall not stand, and it shall not come to pass.
zh: 因此，主耶和華這樣說： “這計謀必立不住， 也不能成就，

en: For the head of Syria is Damascus, and the head of Damascus is Rezin. (Within sixty-five years Ephraim will be broken to pieces so that it will no longer be a people.)
zh: 因為亞蘭的首都是大馬士革， 大馬士革的首領是利汛； 六十五年之內， 以法蓮必定毀滅，不再成為一族之民。

en: "'And the head of Ephraim is Samaria, and the head of Samaria is the son of Remaliah. If you are not firm in faith, you will not be firm at all.'"
zh: 以法蓮的首都是撒瑪利亞， 撒瑪利亞的首領是利瑪利的兒子； 你們若不相信，就必定不得堅立。”’”

en: Again the LORD spoke to Ahaz,
zh: 耶和華又告訴亞哈斯說：

en: "Ask a sign of the LORD your God; let it be deep as Sheol or high as heaven."
zh: “你向耶和華你的 神求一個兆頭，或求顯在深處，或求顯在高處。”

en: But Ahaz said, "I will not ask, and I will not put the LORD to the test."
zh: 但亞哈斯說：“我不求，我不試探耶和華。”

en: And he said, "Hear then, O house of David! Is it too little for you to weary men, that you weary my God also?
zh: 以賽亞說：“大衛家啊，你們要聽！你們使人厭煩還算小事，還要使我的 神厭煩嗎？

en: Therefore the Lord himself will give you a sign. Behold, the virgin shall conceive and bear a son, and shall call his name Immanuel.
zh: 因此主自己必給你們一個兆頭：看哪！必有童女懷孕生子；她要給他起名叫‘以馬內利’。

en: He shall eat curds and honey when he knows how to refuse the evil and choose the good.
zh: 到他曉得棄惡擇善的時候，他必吃乳酪和蜂蜜。

en: For before the boy knows how to refuse the evil and choose the good, the land whose two kings you dread will be deserted.
zh: 因為在這孩子曉得棄惡擇善之先，你所畏懼的那兩個王之地，早就被棄絕了。

en: The LORD will bring upon you and upon your people and upon your father's house such days as have not come since the day that Ephraim departed from Judah- the king of Assyria."
zh: “耶和華必使災難的日子臨到你和你的人民，以及你的父家，自從以法蓮脫離猶大以來，未曾有過這樣的日子，就是亞述王的入侵。”

en: In that day the LORD will whistle for the fly that is at the end of the streams of Egypt, and for the bee that is in the land of Assyria.
zh: 到那時，耶和華必發出哨聲，把埃及河流盡頭的蒼蠅和亞述地的蜂子召來。

en: And they will all come and settle in the steep ravines, and in the clefts of the rocks, and on all the thornbushes, and on all the pastures.
zh: 牠們都必飛來，落在陡峭的山谷中、巖石的穴裡、一切荊棘叢中和所有的草場上。

en: In that day the Lord will shave with a razor that is hired beyond the River- with the king of Assyria- the head and the hair of the feet, and it will sweep away the beard also.
zh: 到那日，主必用大河那邊租來的剃刀，就是亞述王，剃去你們的頭髮和腳上的毛，並且剃淨你們的鬍鬚。

en: In that day a man will keep alive a young cow and two sheep,
zh: 到那時，一個人只能養活一頭母牛犢和兩隻母綿羊。

en: and because of the abundance of milk that they give, he will eat curds, for everyone who is left in the land will eat curds and honey.
zh: 因為出的奶多，他就可以吃乳酪；境內剩下的人，都要吃乳酪和蜂蜜。

en: In that day every place where there used to be a thousand vines, worth a thousand shekels of silver, will become briers and thorns.
zh: 到那日，從前種一千棵葡萄樹，價值一萬一千四百克銀子的地方，現在卻成為荊棘和蒺藜生長之處。

en: With bow and arrows a man will come there, for all the land will be briers and thorns.
zh: 人到那裡去，必須攜帶弓和箭，因為遍地都是荊棘和蒺藜。

en: And as for all the hills that used to be hoed with a hoe, you will not come there for fear of briers and thorns, but they will become a place where cattle are let loose and where sheep tread.
zh: 以前所有用鋤頭挖掘的山地，你因為懼怕荊棘和蒺藜，都不敢上那裡去；那裡就成了放牛之地，羊群踐踏之處。
